  • Airlock Knowledge Base — Vertical: LAW FIRMS (Base Layer)

Orbit AI — WEBSITE & PLATFORM CATALOG

Exhaustive menu of products, layouts, features, options, and development services — tier-gated. The ladder mirrors the KB: Gold → Platinum → Iridium → Rhodium. Premium add-ons open at higher tiers; the premium-of-premium options live only at the top.

Two axes. Build tier (Gold→Rhodium, §A–F) = what you get. Service level (DIY · Hybrid/Guru-Assisted · DFY · Diamond Support, §G) = how it's delivered & supported. A client picks one of each. Premium-of-premium is gated on both: Rhodium (build) and Diamond (support).

A. PRODUCTS (packaged build tiers)

Tier Name For Core deliverable Typical positioning
Gold Starter Site brand-new or first website 1–3 pages, bilingual, mobile-first, contact form, click-to-call, Google Maps, basic SEO "be findable + reachable"
Platinum Growth Site established SMBs ready to convert 5–8 pages, booking/scheduling, grounded chat assistant, reviews, gallery, on-page SEO, analytics "convert visitors into calls/bookings"
Iridium Premium Site multi-service / multi-location 10+ pages, e-commerce or service catalog, AI voice receptionist, CRM + QuickBooks/automation wiring, abandoned-cart, customer portal "run the front office on autopilot"
Rhodium Signature Platform market leaders / franchises everything + custom design system, custom integrations, voice-clone receptionist, self-learning content, white-label/multi-site "own your category"

Recurring layer (any tier): hosting + maintenance + the AI receptionist subscription + automation runtime.

Standalone products (sell with or without a site)

  • AI Voice Receptionist (bilingual EN/ES, transfer-to-human) — Solo / Growth / Agency / White-Label minute pools.
  • Grounded Chat Assistant (catalog/KB-grounded, no hallucination).
  • Dialect Module (see dialect-module/) — sold as packs/tiers.
  • Presence Audit (site/listings/reviews scorecard) — lead magnet + upsell.
  • Automation Systems (n8n: order→QuickBooks→shipping, lead routing, follow-ups).
  • Ops Audit (process + tooling review).

B. LAYOUTS & PAGE TYPES

Page types

Home · Services (index + per-service) · About / Our Story · Team / Staff · Contact · Booking / Scheduling · Menu (food) · Product Catalog / Shop · Single Product · Cart / Checkout · Order Confirmation / Tracking · Gallery / Portfolio · Reviews / Testimonials · FAQ · Pricing / Packages · Blog / News index + post · Case Studies · Locations / Service-Area · Careers / Apply · Quote / Estimate Request · Landing Pages (campaign) · Thank-You pages · Legal (Privacy / Terms / Accessibility) · Customer Portal / Account · Resource / Downloads · Events / Calendar · 404.

Layout systems

  • Hero styles: full-bleed image, split (copy/visual), video background, animated SVG scene, carousel, before/after slider.
  • Section blocks: feature grid, stats band, logo/credential strip, step/process timeline, comparison table, pricing cards, testimonial slider, FAQ accordion, CTA band, map + hours, gallery masonry, team grid.
  • Navigation: sticky header, mega-menu, left category sidebar (catalog), breadcrumb, sticky mobile call/book bar, mega-footer.
  • Device modes: mobile-first responsive (every tier); desktop/tablet/mobile preview shell (Platinum+).
  • Design systems: template-based (Gold), per-vertical themed (Platinum), custom brand system + tokens (Iridium), bespoke design language (Rhodium).

C. FEATURES (by category)

C1. Core

Mobile-first responsive · bilingual EN/ES toggle · click-to-call · Google Maps + directions · business hours (with open/closed state) · contact form · social links · favicon/branding · SSL/HTTPS · fast static hosting.

C2. Conversion

Booking/scheduling (calendar) · quote/estimate request · multi-step forms · callback request · lead capture + routing to CRM · exit-intent / sticky CTA · click-to-text (SMS) · WhatsApp link · review-request flow · coupon/offer banners.

C3. Commerce

Product catalog + categories · left-sidebar category nav · search + filters (category/vendor/price/fitment) · cart + checkout · payments (Stripe/Square/PayPal) · shipping rate logic (box size/weight/zip, no markup) · order confirmation + tracking emails · abandoned-cart reminders · inventory/stock display · order desk / back-office mock or live (order→QuickBooks→label).

C4. Content

Blog/CMS · gallery/portfolio · video embeds · downloadable resources · menu builder (food) · service pages (per niche) · testimonials/reviews feed · FAQ engine · case studies · events/calendar.

C5. AI & Receptionist

Grounded chat assistant (KB/catalog-grounded, transfer-to-human) · AI voice receptionist (bilingual, AMD-gated, sub-200ms, human handoff) · call script generator · presence-audit engine · post-call synthesis → CRM disposition.

C6. Bilingual & Dialect (see dialect-module/)

EN/ES site toggle · bilingual receptionist + chat · Español Neutro floor (all tiers) · regional dialect tuning (Platinum+) · dialect TTS voice (Iridium+) · custom/voice-clone dialect (Rhodium).

C7. Integration & Automation

CRM (Attio) sync · QuickBooks invoicing · calendar (Google) booking · email/SMS notifications · n8n automation workflows · webhook endpoints · Zapier/Make bridges · review-platform sync · payment-processor + accounting reconcile.

C8. SEO & Performance

On-page SEO · schema/structured data · local SEO + Google Business Profile alignment · directory-listing consistency · sitemap/robots · Core Web Vitals tuning · image optimization · AEO/AIO (answer-engine) optimization.

C9. Security, Compliance & Accessibility

SSL · anti-scraping (robots, X-Robots-Tag, noindex where wanted) · form spam/bot protection · WCAG/ADA accessibility pass · privacy/terms/cookie handling · role-based portal access · data-capture compliance (no PHI/SSN in the wrong places).

C10. Analytics & Ops

Traffic analytics · call/lead tracking · conversion events · dashboard/reporting · A/B testing · uptime monitoring · heatmaps (premium).

D. OPTIONS & ADD-ONS (à la carte) — with tier gating

Add-on Earliest tier Positioning
Extra pages (per page) Gold standard
Booking/scheduling Platinum premium
Grounded chat assistant Platinum premium
Reviews/testimonials integration Platinum premium
Blog/CMS Platinum premium
E-commerce / catalog Iridium premium+
Order desk (order→QuickBooks→label) Iridium premium+
Abandoned-cart + order-status automation Iridium premium+
AI voice receptionist Iridium premium+
CRM + automation wiring (n8n) Iridium premium+
Customer/member portal Iridium premium+
Extra Dialect Pack / Voseo / Spanglish Platinum premium
Dialect TTS voice Iridium premium+
+Additional language (built) Iridium premium+
Custom design system / bespoke UI Rhodium premium of premium
Voice-clone / accent-matched receptionist Rhodium premium of premium
Custom client dialect tuning Rhodium premium of premium
Self-learning content/dialect loop Rhodium premium of premium
Indigenous greeting layer Rhodium premium of premium
White-label / multi-site / franchise Rhodium premium of premium
Validated +language (native sign-off) Rhodium premium of premium
Custom integrations / API development Rhodium premium of premium

Ladder rule: premium opens at Platinum, premium+ at Iridium, premium-of-premium only at Rhodium — the best features are the reason to upgrade and cannot be bought à la carte on a lower tier.

E. DEVELOPMENT SERVICES

  • Build: template build (Gold) · themed build (Platinum) · custom build (Iridium) · bespoke design + dev (Rhodium).
  • Integrations: QuickBooks · Attio CRM · Telnyx telephony · Deepgram STT/TTS · Stripe/Square/PayPal · Google Calendar/Maps/Business Profile · n8n workflows · custom REST/webhook APIs.
  • Migrations: WordPress/Wix/Squarespace → Orbit · data/catalog import · domain/DNS/email cutover · 301 redirect mapping.
  • Automation: order→invoice→label · lead scrape→verify→enrich→CRM · post-call synthesis · follow-up scheduler · abandoned-cart · review-request.
  • Voice/AI: receptionist deployment · KB compile + dialect module · call-script generator · presence-audit engine.
  • Ongoing: hosting · maintenance/updates · content updates · uptime/monitoring · SEO/AEO retainer · A/B testing · analytics reporting · security patching.
  • Audits: presence audit · SEO/AIO audit · accessibility audit · ops audit · conversion audit.

F. MASTER TIER MATRIX (what's included where)

Capability Gold Platinum Iridium Rhodium
Pages 1–3 5–8 10+ unlimited / multi-site
Mobile-first + bilingual toggle ✅ ✅ ✅ ✅
Contact form + click-to-call + map ✅ ✅ ✅ ✅
Basic SEO ✅ ✅ ✅ ✅
Design template themed per vertical custom system bespoke
Booking / scheduling — ✅ ✅ ✅
Grounded chat assistant — ✅ ✅ ✅
Reviews · gallery · blog/CMS — ✅ ✅ ✅
On-page SEO + analytics — ✅ ✅ ✅
Device-preview shell — ✅ ✅ ✅
Regional dialect tuning (13) — ✅ ✅ ✅
E-commerce / catalog + checkout — — ✅ ✅
Order desk → QuickBooks → label — — ✅ ✅
Abandoned-cart + order-status — — ✅ ✅
AI voice receptionist — — ✅ ✅
CRM + n8n automation wiring — — ✅ ✅
Customer/member portal — — ✅ ✅
Dialect TTS + validated dialect — — ✅ ✅
+Language profile (built) — — ✅ ✅
Custom design system — — — ✅
Voice-clone / accent match — — — ✅
Custom dialect / self-learning loop — — — ✅
Indigenous greeting layer — — — ✅
White-label / multi-site / franchise — — — ✅
Custom integrations / API dev — — — ✅
Validated +language (native sign-off) — — — ✅

G. SERVICE & SUPPORT LEVELS (how it's delivered)

The build tier (§A–F) defines what you get. The service level defines how much we do and how much support you get. They're independent axes — a client picks one build tier × one service level.

Level Tagline Who does the work Best for
DIY Self-Serve Kit You build with our tools + docs agencies, resellers, technical owners
Hybrid Guru Assisted You drive; a Guru co-pilots the hard parts owners who want control + expert hands
DFY Done For You We build, deploy & hand over busy owners who want it handled
Diamond Diamond Support Package Dedicated Full Architect Guru + priority queue market leaders who want it owned + evolving

What each level includes

Pillar DIY Hybrid (Guru Assisted) DFY Diamond (add-on)
Site build templates + generators, you deploy you build, Guru does complex parts + reviews we build & deploy end-to-end + proactive redesign / optimization
KB / agent packs + compiler, you wire guided compile + wiring compiled + wired by us + ongoing prompt tuning
Dialect glossary + packs, you select Guru tunes register / dialect selected + tuned by us + dialect re-validation cycles
Automation workflow templates, you import Guru wires the tricky flows built + tested by us + new automations on request
Onboarding docs / knowledge base scheduled working sessions full handover + training + quarterly strategy reviews
Support / SLA standard queue (async) standard + Guru sessions standard post-launch Priority Queue + Full Architect Guru

The Guru ladder (how much expert you get)

  • DIY → Guru via docs / community only.
  • Hybrid → Guru Assisted: scheduled sessions; the Guru unblocks you and builds the complex parts (dialect, compliance, automation).
  • DFY → the Guru's team builds it for you.
  • Diamond → a dedicated Full Architect Guru: proactive monitoring + optimization, direct line, first access to new features.

Diamond Support Package (premium of premium)

The apex support layer — gated to higher build tiers (add-on on Iridium, included by default on Rhodium): - Priority Support Queue — front of the line, defined fast-response SLA. - Full Architect Guru — a dedicated architect assigned to the account: proactive system health + optimization, monthly evolution/strategy, direct line (chat/phone), first access to new dialects/features, quarterly audits + dialect re-validation.

The two-axis model

                  DELIVERY / SUPPORT  →
                  DIY     Hybrid    DFY     Diamond
   B  Gold        ✓       ✓         ✓       —
   U  Platinum    ✓       ✓         ✓       —
   I  Iridium     ✓       ✓         ✓       add-on
   L  Rhodium     ✓       ✓         ✓       included
   D  ↓

Build tier = what · Service level = how. Standard support on Gold/Platinum, Priority on Iridium, Diamond at the top. Diamond is premium-of-premium and cannot be bought on Gold/Platinum — same ladder logic as the build features.

H. How to price it (framework — set your own numbers)

Two pricing axes stack: - Build fee scales with the build tier (Gold < Platinum < Iridium < Rhodium) — sets the scope. - Delivery scales with the service level (DIY lowest → Hybrid → DFY highest) — sets the labor. - Recurring: hosting + maintenance + receptionist minute pool + automation runtime — plus a Diamond Support uplift where selected. - À-la-carte add-ons: per the tier-gated table in §D; premium-of-premium (build) carries a Rhodium floor, premium-of-premium (support) = Diamond. - Anchor on ROI, fixed price, no surprises (clients are burned by agencies that scope-creep $10k→$25k). Quote the build flat; meter only the receptionist minutes/usage.

Worked example: Iridium build × DFY delivery + Diamond Support = full premium site/receptionist, built end-to-end by Orbit, with a dedicated Architect Guru and priority SLA — your top everyday package below Rhodium.

Set final dollar figures in your offer deck — this catalog defines the menu, the build tiers, the service levels, and the gating on both axes.

Static docs for the airlock-vertical-kb Claude Code skill · generated from skills/airlock-vertical-kb/.
